qa_pair.question: Use the intervals-icu MCP server to look up the athlete's profile. What is the LTHR (lactate threshold heart rate) configured for the Ride sport? Answer with the integer value only.
Use the intervals-icu MCP server to read the athlete's profile. What is the maximum heart rate (max_hr) configured for the Ride sport? Answer with the integer value only.
Use the intervals-icu MCP server to look up the athlete's profile. What is the icu_resting_hr value? Answer with the integer only.
Use the intervals-icu MCP server to read the athlete's profile and count the registered bikes. How many bikes are in the bikes array? Answer with the integer only.
Use the intervals-icu MCP server to look up the athlete's profile. What is the timezone setting (the value of the "timezone" field)?
Use the intervals-icu MCP server to fetch the wellness record for the date 2026-04-25. What was the readiness score? Answer with the integer only.
Use the intervals-icu MCP server to fetch the wellness record for the date 2026-04-25. What was the resting HR value (restingHR field)? Answer with the integer only.
Use the intervals-icu MCP server to fetch the wellness record for the date 2026-04-25. What was the sleep duration in seconds (sleepSecs field)? Answer with the integer only.
Use the intervals-icu MCP server to fetch the wellness record for the date 2026-04-25 and round the CTL value down to the nearest whole number (e.g. 50.08 becomes 50). What integer do you get?
Use the intervals-icu MCP server to read the athlete's profile. Compute the difference between max_hr and lthr for the Ride sport (max_hr - lthr). Answer with the integer only.
